_what: The design token registry — THE source of truth for the look. emit.py compiles this → ../design-system.css (which every mockup links). Edit here, never the generated CSS. Add a token = add an entry (extend-by-registration); add a category = add a group. Each token is {"v": value} (flat) or {"ref": <primitive>} (resolves to a primitive — change the primitive in one place, every ref follows).

groups.name: ink on bright surfaces
groups.note: The near-black text colour that sits ON accent/await coloured chips, badges, primary buttons (legibility on bright fills). Recurs corpus-wide; promoted from hardcoded literals 2026-06-05.

groups.name: node-type visual language
groups.note: KIND drives colour. REALITY (audit 2026-06-03): only TWO kinds live — process & content. 'present' is contract-allowed but has no live node (future). 'model' is a config-slot accent, NOT a node kind.
